title: find_synthesis_claims data payload
description: Returns paragraphs from the cuneiform-research vault that carry [my synthesis] / [unverified] / [Cluster synthesis…] markers. These are the novel-but-unsettled interpretive claims that the brief author has explicitly flagged as their own synthesis (not scholarly consensus). Wrapped in the StructuredEnvelope from envelope.schema.json.

query.description: Optional question used to filter claims by BM25 relevance. Null when returning all claims.

marker.description: The exact marker text used (e.g. '[my synthesis]', '[Cluster synthesis — my reading]').

paragraph.description: The paragraph that contains the marker.
